  "title": "Docker Foundations: Containers and the Layer System",
  "scope": "Establish a core mental model by comparing containers to virtual machines and explaining the architecture of Docker images. You will learn why containers are lightweight and how the layer system enables efficient image building and sharing.",
  "concepts": ["Containers vs VMs", "Docker images and the layer system"],
  "estimatedSections": 4
}

  "title": "Foundations: Containers, Images, and Layers",
  "scope": "Establish a core mental model by comparing containers to virtual machines and explaining why Docker is lightweight. Introduce Docker images and the layer system to show how containers are built and shared efficiently.",
  "concepts": ["Containers vs VMs", "Docker images and the layer system"],
  "estimatedSections": 4
}

{
  "done": false,
  "title": "The Docker Mental Model: Containers and Images",
  "scope": "This section establishes the foundational mental model for Docker by comparing containers to virtual machines and explaining the architecture of Docker images and the layer system. It focuses on how Docker achieves lightweight isolation and why the image layer system is efficient for development.",
  "concepts": ["Containers vs VMs", "Docker images and the layer system"],
  "estimatedSections": 4
}
